name: Dashboard

task.description: Build a dense single-page analytics dashboard for 'MetricHub' at 1920px wide. It must contain, in this order: (1) a fixed top bar with the 'MetricHub' logo on the left, a centered search input, and a user avatar + 'Settings' link on the right; (2) a left sidebar (240px) with 6 nav items (Overview, Traffic, Revenue, Users, Reports, Settings) where 'Overview' is the active/highlighted item; (3) a main area with a row of FOUR equal-width KPI cards (Revenue $128,400 +12.3%, Users 24,108 +4.1%, Sessions 91,233 -2.0%, Conversion 3.4% +0.6%) each showing label, big number, and a colored delta (green for +, red for -); (4) below, TWO equal-width chart panels side by side ('Revenue over time' and 'Traffic sources') each at least 320px tall with a titled header and an inline-SVG chart placeholder; (5) below that, a full-width data table 'Top pages' with columns Page | Views | Avg time | Bounce and at least 6 rows. Responsive: at 375px the sidebar collapses (hidden or to a top hamburger), KPI cards stack to 1 column, and chart panels stack vertically.
requirements: A fixed top bar contains the logo (left), a centered search input, and avatar + Settings (right), all vertically centered
The left sidebar is ~240px wide and lists all six nav items with 'Overview' visibly highlighted as active
The four KPI cards are equal width, aligned in one row with uniform gaps, each showing label, number, and a delta
Positive deltas are green and the negative Sessions delta (-2.0%) is red
The two chart panels are equal width, side by side, each >=320px tall with a titled header and a visible chart placeholder
The 'Top pages' table shows all four column headers and at least 6 data rows with no cell text clipped
On desktop (1920px) nothing overflows horizontally and there is no unexpected horizontal scrollbar
At 375px width the four KPI cards stack into a single column
At 375px width the two chart panels stack vertically (not side by side)
At 375px the sidebar is collapsed/hidden (replaced by a hamburger or removed), not overlapping the content
All numeric values listed are present exactly as given
Text and background colors maintain legible contrast throughout

trace.output:
<think>
Let me build a comprehensive analytics dashboard for MetricHub with all the specified requirements.

Key requirements:
1. Fixed top bar: logo left, centered search, avatar + Settings right
2. Left sidebar 240px with 6 nav items, Overview active
3. 4 KPI cards row: Revenue $128,400 +12.3%, Users 24,108 +4.1%, Sessions 91,233 -2.0%, Conversion 3.4% +0.6%
4. 2 equal-width chart panels side by side, each ≥320px tall with SVG placeholders


5. Full-width data table with 6+ rows
6. Responsive: sidebar collapses at 375px, KPI cards stack, charts stack

Now I'm planning the layout structure with a fixed top bar around 60px, a fixed left sidebar at 240px wide, and main content that adjusts its margin accordingly. I'll use a dark navy and blue color scheme with a purple accent for interactive elements and green/red for positive and negative metrics.

Writing the HTML and CSS... Still writing styles... Writing component styles... Writing layout and sidebar styles... Writing component styles... Still writing styles... Still writing styles... Still writing styles... Adding styling for badges and responsive design... Writing the chart visualizations... Calculating SVG coordinates...
</think>
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>MetricHub – Analytics Dashboard</title>
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
      --bg:          #0d1021;
      --surface:     #151829;
      --surface2:    #1c2040;
      --border:      #262c52;
      --accent:      #6c63ff;
      --accent2:     #a855f7;
      --green:       #22c55e;
      --red:         #ef4444;
      --yellow:      #fbbf24;
      --text:        #e2e8f0;
      --muted:       #64748b;
      --subtext:     #94a3b8;
      --radius:      14px;
      --topbar-h:    64px;
      --sidebar-w:   240px;
    }

    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

    body {
      font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
      background: var(--bg);
      color: var(--text);
      min-height: 100vh;
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }

    /* ─── TOP BAR ─── */
    .topbar {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      height: var(--topbar-h);
      background: var(--surface);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 0 24px;
      z-index: 1000;
      gap: 0;
    }

    .topbar-logo {
      flex: 0 0 var(--sidebar-w);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      text-decoration: none;
    }

    .logo-box {
      width: 36px; height: 36px;
      border-radius: 9px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2));
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-weight: 900;
      font-size: 1rem;
      color: #fff;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    .logo-text {
      font-size: 1.35rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: #fff;
      letter-spacing: -0.5px;
    }
    .logo-text span { color: var(--accent); }

    .topbar-search {
      flex: 1;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 0 32px;
    }

    .search-wrap {
      position: relative;
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 520px;
    }

    .search-icon {
      position: absolute;
      left: 14px; top: 50%;
      transform: translateY(-50%);
      color: var(--muted);
      pointer-events: none;
      line-height: 1;
    }

    .topbar-search input {
      width: 100%;
      background: var(--surface2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 10px;
      padding: 10px 16px 10px 42px;
      color: var(--text);
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      outline: none;
      transition: border-color 0.2s;
    }
    .topbar-search input::placeholder { color: var(--muted); }
    .topbar-search input:focus { border-color: var(--accent); }

    .topbar-right {
      flex: 0 0 var(--sidebar-w);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: flex-end;
      gap: 18px;
    }

    .notif-btn {
      position: relative;
      background: none;
      border: none;
      color: var(--subtext);
      cursor: pointer;
      padding: 4px;
      line-height: 1;
      transition: color 0.2s;
    }
    .notif-btn:hover { color: var(--text); }

    .notif-dot {
      position: absolute;
      top: 2px; right: 2px;
      width: 8px; height: 8px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--accent);
      border: 2px solid var(--surface);
    }

    .avatar {
      width: 38px; height: 38px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2));
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: #fff;
      cursor: pointer;
      border: 2px solid var(--border);
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    .settings-link {
      color: var(--subtext);
      text-decoration: none;
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      transition: color 0.2s;
    }
    .settings-link:hover { color: var(--text); }

    .hamburger-btn {
      display: none;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 5px;
      cursor: pointer;
      background: none;
      border: none;
      padding: 6px;
    }
    .hamburger-btn span {
      display: block;
      width: 22px; height: 2px;
      background: var(--text);
      border-radius: 2px;
      transition: all 0.25s;
    }

    /* ─── LAYOUT ─── */
    .layout {
      display: flex;
      margin-top: var(--topbar-h);
      min-height: calc(100vh - var(--topbar-h));
    }

    /* ─── SIDEBAR ─── */
    .sidebar {
      position: fixed;
      top: var(--topbar-h);
      left: 0;
      bottom: 0;
      width: var(--sidebar-w);
      background: var(--surface);
      border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
      overflow-y: auto;
      overflow-x: hidden;
      z-index: 800;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      padding: 20px 0 24px;
    }

    .nav-label {
      font-size: 0.68rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 1.3px;
      color: #3d4575;
      padding: 20px 22px 8px;
    }

    .nav-item {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 12px;
      padding: 11px 22px;
      color: var(--subtext);
      text-decoration: none;
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      border-left: 3px solid transparent;
      transition: all 0.18s;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .nav-item:hover {
      background: rgba(108,99,255,0.07);
      color: var(--text);
      border-left-color: rgba(108,99,255,0.4);
    }

    .nav-item.active {
      background: rgba(108,99,255,0.13);
      color: var(--accent);
      border-left-color: var(--accent);
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    .nav-icon {
      width: 20px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
    }

    .nav-pill {
      margin-left: auto;
      background: var(--accent);
      color: #fff;
      font-size: 0.68rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      padding: 2px 8px;
      border-radius: 10px;
    }

    /* ─── MAIN ─── */
    .main {
      margin-left: var(--sidebar-w);
      flex: 1;
      padding: 32px 32px 56px;
      min-width: 0;
    }

    .page-head {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      justify-content: space-between;
      margin-bottom: 28px;
      gap: 16px;
    }

    .page-head-text h1 {
      font-size: 1.65rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: #fff;
      letter-spacing: -0.5px;
    }

    .page-head-text p {
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      margin-top: 4px;
    }

    .date-filter {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .btn-ghost {
      background: var(--surface2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--subtext);
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      padding: 8px 16px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.2s;
    }
    .btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); }

    .btn-accent {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2));
      border: none;
      color: #fff;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      padding: 8px 18px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    /* ─── KPI CARDS ─── */
    .kpi-row {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
      gap: 20px;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }

    .kpi-card {
      background: var(--surface2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      padding: 24px;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .kpi-card::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      height: 3px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2));
      border-radius: var(--radius) var(--radius) 0 0;
    }

    .kpi-bg-icon {
      position: absolute;
      right: 16px; top: 50%;
      transform: translateY(-50%);
      font-size: 4rem;
      opacity: 0.04;
      pointer-events: none;
      user-select: none;
    }

    .kpi-label {
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      color: var(--muted);
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }

    .kpi-value {
      font-size: 2.4rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: #fff;
      letter-spacing: -1.5px;
      line-height: 1;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }

    .kpi-footer {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
    }

    .kpi-delta {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 3px;
      font-size: 0.82rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      padding: 3px 10px;
      border-radius: 20px;
    }

    .kpi-delta.pos {
      background: rgba(34,197,94,0.12);
      color: var(--green);
    }

    .kpi-delta.neg {
      background: rgba(239,68,68,0.12);
      color: var(--red);
    }

    .kpi-vs {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    /* ─── CHARTS ROW ─── */
    .charts-row {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 20px;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }

    .chart-panel {
      background: var(--surface2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      overflow: hidden;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
    }

    .panel-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 20px 24px 14px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      gap: 12px;
    }

    .panel-title {
      font-size: 1rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--text);
    }

    .panel-sub {
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      margin-top: 3px;
    }

    .panel-badge {
      background: rgba(108,99,255,0.14);
      color: var(--accent);
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      padding: 4px 12px;
      border-radius: 20px;
      white-space: nowrap;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    .chart-body {
      padding: 20px 24px 24px;
      flex: 1;
      min-height: 320px;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
    }

    /* ─── TABLE PANEL ─── */
    .table-panel {
      background: var(--surface2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .table-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 20px 24px 14px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      gap: 16px;
    }

    .table-title {
      font-size: 1rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--text);
    }

    .table-sub {
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      color: var(--muted);
      margin-top: 3px;
    }

   

… [truncated, 17,578 more characters]

  2. [MAJOR] Traffic sources chart panel shows no actual chart content - only empty space where chart should be (at bottom-right)
  3. [MAJOR] Text at top of page appears to be overflowing or corrupted with repeated styling text fragments (at top)

Suggested fixes:

  2. Implement actual chart visualization in the Traffic sources panel instead of empty space
  3. Fix the corrupted/overflowing text at the top of the page
  4. Ensure all required content elements are present and properly rendered

      font-weight: 700;
      padding: 2px 8px;
      border-radius: 10px;
    }

    /* ─── MAIN ─── */
    .main {
      margin-left: var(--sidebar-w);
      flex: 1;
      padding: 32px 32px 56px;
      min-width: 0;
    }

    .page-head {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      justify-content: space-between;
      margin-bottom: 28px;
      gap: 16px;
    }

    .page-head-text h1 {
      font-size: 1.65rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: #fff;
      letter-spacing: -0.5px;
    }

    .page-head-text p {
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      margin-top: 4px;
    }

    .date-filter { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }

    .btn-ghost {
      background: var(--surface2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--subtext);
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      padding: 8px 16px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.2s;
    }
    .btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); }

    .btn-accent {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2));
      border: none;
      color: #fff;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      padding: 8px 18px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    /* ─── KPI CARDS ─── */
    .kpi-row {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
      gap: 20px;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }

    .kpi-card {
      background: var(--surface2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      padding: 24px;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .kpi-card::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      height: 3px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2));
      border-radius: var(--radius) var(--radius) 0 0;
    }

    .kpi-bg-icon {
      position: absolute;
      right: 16px; top: 50%;
      transform: translateY(-50%);
      font-size: 4rem;
      opacity: 0.04;
      pointer-events: none;
      user-select: none;
    }

    .kpi-label {
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      color: var(--muted);
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }

    .kpi-value {
      font-size: 2.4rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: #fff;
      letter-spacing: -1.5px;
      line-height: 1;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }

    .kpi-footer { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }

    .kpi-delta {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 3px;
      font-size: 0.82rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      padding: 3px 10px;
      border-radius: 20px;
    }

    .kpi-delta.pos { background: rgba(34,197,94,0.12); color: var(--green); }
    .kpi-delta.neg { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.12);  color: var(--red);   }

    .kpi-vs { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--muted); }

    /* ─── CHARTS ROW ─── */
    .charts-row {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 20px;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }

    .chart-panel {
      background: var(--surface2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      overflow: hidden;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
    }

    .panel-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 20px 24px 14px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      gap: 12px;
    }

    .panel-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); }
    .panel-sub   { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 3px; }

    .panel-badge {
      background: rgba(108,99,255,0.14);
      color: var(--accent);
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      padding: 4px 12px;
      border-radius: 20px;
      white-space: nowrap;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    .chart-body {
      padding: 20px 24px 24px;
      flex: 1;
      min-height: 320px;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
    }

    /* ─── TABLE PANEL ─── */
    .table-panel {
      background: var(--surface2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .table-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 20px 24px 14px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      gap: 16px;
    }

    .table-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); }
    .table-sub   { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 3px; }
    .table-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; }

    .btn-sm {
      background: var(--surface);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--subtext);
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      padding: 6px 14px;
      border-radius: 7px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.18s;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .btn-sm:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); }

    .btn-sm-accent {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2));
      border: none;
      color: #fff;
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      padding: 6px 14px;
      border-radius: 7px;
      cursor: pointer;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .data-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }

    .data-table thead th {
      background: var(--surface);
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      font-weight: 700;

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>MetricHub – Analytics Dashboard</title>
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
      --bg:          #0d1021;
      --surface:     #151829;
      --surface2:    #1c2040;
      --border:      #262c52;
      --accent:      #6c63ff;
      --accent2:     #a855f7;
      --green:       #22c55e;
      --red:         #ef4444;
      --yellow:      #fbbf24;
      --text:        #e2e8f0;
      --muted:       #64748b;
      --subtext:     #94a3b8;
      --radius:      14px;
      --topbar-h:    64px;
      --sidebar-w:   240px;
    }

    body {
      font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
      background: var(--bg);
      color: var(--text);
      min-height: 100vh;
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }

    /* ─── TOP BAR ─── */
    .topbar {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      height: var(--topbar-h);
      background: var(--surface);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 0 24px;
      z-index: 1000;
    }

    .topbar-logo {
      flex: 0 0 var(--sidebar-w);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      text-decoration: none;
    }

    .logo-box {
      width: 36px; height: 36px;
      border-radius: 9px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2));
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-weight: 900;
      font-size: 1rem;
      color: #fff;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    .logo-text {
      font-size: 1.35rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: #fff;
      letter-spacing: -0.5px;
    }
    .logo-text span { color: var(--accent); }

    .topbar-search {
      flex: 1;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 0 32px;
    }

    .search-wrap {
      position: relative;
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 520px;
    }

    .search-icon {
      position: absolute;
      left: 14px; top: 50%;
      transform: translateY(-50%);
      color: var(--muted);
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .topbar-search input {
      width: 100%;
      background: var(--surface2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 10px;
      padding: 10px 16px 10px 42px;
      color: var(--text);
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      outline: none;
      transition: border-color 0.2s;
    }
    .topbar-search input::placeholder { color: var(--muted); }
    .topbar-search input:focus { border-color: var(--accent); }

    .topbar-right {
      flex: 0 0 var(--sidebar-w);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: flex-end;
      gap: 18px;
    }

    .notif-btn {
      position: relative;
      background: none;
      border: none;
      color: var(--subtext);
      cursor: pointer;
      padding: 4px;
      line-height: 1;
    }

    .notif-dot {
      position: absolute;
      top: 2px; right: 2px;
      width: 8px; height: 8px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--accent);
      border: 2px solid var(--surface);
    }

    .avatar {
      width: 38px; height: 38px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2));
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: #fff;
      cursor: pointer;
      border: 2px solid var(--border);
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    .settings-link {
      color: var(--subtext);
      text-decoration: none;
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      transition: color 0.2s;
    }
    .settings-link:hover { color: var(--text); }

    .hamburger-btn {
      display: none;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 5px;
      cursor: pointer;
      background: none;
      border: none;
      padding: 6px;
    }
    .hamburger-btn span {
      display: block;
      width: 22px; height: 2px;
      background: var(--text);
      border-radius: 2px;
    }

    /* ─── LAYOUT ─── */
    .layout {
      display: flex;
      margin-top: var(--topbar-h);
      min-height: calc(100vh - var(--topbar-h));
    }

    /* ─── SIDEBAR ─── */
    .sidebar {
      position: fixed;
      top: var(--topbar-h);
      left: 0;
      bottom: 0;

      background: var(--surface);

      padding: 20px 0 24px;
    }

    }
    .btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); }
